title: Beauty Subscriptions and More | Birchbox

headers.text: A Fresh Season of Beauty Awaits
A customizable box of premium beauty products delivered monthly.
Stay in touch for deals, news, and more!

paragraphs: Choose every product, from cult favorites to breakout brands.
Answer a few questions to help us match you with the right products for your skin, hair, and style.
Choose the products you want, or let us build a box that's tailored just for you.
Try new products each month, find your favorites in our Shop, and be effortlessly you.
Other beauty boxes limit your choices or send the same products to everyone. Not here. You have the power to choose exactly what you want from samples, travel-size, and full-size options.
content: A Fresh Season of Beauty Awaits A customizable box of premium beauty products delivered monthly. Be choosy. Why Birchbox? Products Company Legal Stay in touch for deals, news, and more! Step 1 Share your beauty goals Step 2 Choose your products Step 3 Discover new beauty Get what you want Spring Into Beauty This March Choose every product, from cult favorites to breakout brands. Answer a few questions to help us match you with the right products for your skin, hair, and style. Choose the products you want, or let us build a box that's tailored just for you. Try new products each month, find your favorites in our Shop, and be effortlessly you. Other beauty boxes limit your choices or send the same products to everyone. Not here. You have the power to choose exactly what you want from samples, travel-size, and full-size options.
